function.name: steam.list_games
function.description: List all installed Steam games with their app IDs and install sizes

function.name: steam.game_info
function.description: Get detailed information about a specific Steam game

function.name: steam.set_launch_options
function.description: Set Steam launch options for a game (Steam must be closed first)

function.name: steam.list_mods
function.description: List installed mods for a Steam game by scanning its data directory

function.name: steam.install_mod
function.description: Download and install a mod for a Steam game from Nexus Mods or a direct URL

mod_url.description: Nexus Mods URL or direct download URL for the mod

install_path.description: Override install path within the game directory

backup.description: Backup existing files before overwriting (default: true)
